patterns.title: Creating a Fruit Store Landing Page with React and CSS
patterns.summary: This trajectory outlines the steps to build a basic landing page for a fruit store using React and CSS, including structuring the HTML, displaying product data, and applying styling.
patterns.distillation: When building a simple landing page, start by structuring the HTML with header, main (containing hero and product list sections), and footer. Use CSS to style the page, focusing on layout (e.g., grid for product listing), and visual appeal (e.g., button styling). Use React components and data mapping to render dynamic content efficiently.

patterns.title: React Landing Page Structure for E-commerce
patterns.summary: This trajectory outlines a pattern for structuring a React landing page for an e-commerce store, including component breakdown, data handling, and styling.
patterns.distillation: When creating e-commerce landing pages in React, follow these steps: 1. Define product data structure in `src/data.ts` with fields like `id`, `name`, `price`, and `imageUrl`. 2. Create reusable components in `src/components` such as `Header`, `Hero`, `ProductCard`, `ProductList`, and `Footer`. 3. Implement responsive grid layouts using CSS for `ProductList`. 4. Centralize global styling in `src/index.css` and component-specific styling in dedicated CSS files or modules. 5. Import and render all components within `App.tsx` to assemble the landing page.

patterns.title: React E-commerce Landing Page Structure
patterns.summary: This trajectory outlines a pattern for building an e-commerce landing page using React, including component structure, data management, and styling.
patterns.distillation: When building e-commerce landing pages with React, follow a component-based approach by creating components for the header, hero section, product cards, product list, and footer; manage product data in a separate data file; and use CSS Grid for responsive product listing.

resolved_errors.title: Coder Trae Timeout Issue
resolved_errors.summary: The coder agent, Trae, timed out while attempting to implement the landing page code, indicating a potential problem with task complexity or resource allocation.
resolved_errors.distillation: When assigning UI development tasks, ensure the timeframe is adequate for the complexity, and that the coding agent has sufficient resources or processing power to complete the task within the allotted time. Consider breaking down complex UI tasks into smaller, more manageable sub-tasks.

KnowledgeItems.title: Landing Page Structure and Component Breakdown
KnowledgeItems.summary: Provides a structured approach for building a flower shop landing page using React components and Tailwind CSS.
KnowledgeItems.distillation: When creating landing pages, especially for e-commerce or service-oriented businesses, break down the UI into distinct components such as Header, Hero, FeaturedProducts, About, and Footer to ensure modularity and maintainability, and utilize a consistent styling framework like Tailwind CSS for a modern and responsive design.

KnowledgeItems.title: Browser Preview Failure
KnowledgeItems.summary: The browser preview failed, indicating a potential issue with the rendering or deployment of the web application.
KnowledgeItems.distillation: After code generation or modification, always verify browser previews to ensure the application renders correctly and addresses any potential deployment or rendering issues early in the development cycle.

Knowledge Items.title: Implementasi Komponen Inti & Logika Dashboard dengan Tailwind CSS, Recharts, dan Glassmorphism
Knowledge Items.summary: Pola implementasi dashboard keuangan premium melibatkan penggunaan Tailwind CSS untuk styling, Recharts untuk visualisasi data, komponen GlassCard untuk desain glassmorphism, dan arsitektur folder yang bersih dengan TypeScript.
Knowledge Items.distillation: Saat membangun dashboard keuangan premium, inisialisasi Tailwind CSS, buat komponen GlassCard yang dapat digunakan kembali, bangun DashboardLayout dengan sidebar dan area konten, implementasikan Bento Grid di Dashboard, definisikan tipe data keuangan, dan buat komponen chart dengan Recharts.

Knowledge Items.title: Penyebab Timeout pada Trae Builder
Knowledge Items.summary: Timeout pada Trae Builder terjadi ketika tidak ada kode yang terdeteksi dalam jangka waktu tertentu, menandakan potensi masalah dalam penyelesaian tugas oleh coder.
Knowledge Items.distillation: Pastikan coder memiliki waktu yang cukup untuk menyelesaikan tugas dan mengirimkan kode. Jika timeout sering terjadi, pertimbangkan untuk meningkatkan batas waktu atau menganalisis mengapa coder tidak dapat menyelesaikan tugas tepat waktu. Periksa juga apakah ada kesalahan atau masalah lain yang menghalangi coder dari menyelesaikan pekerjaan.

Knowledge_Items.title: Implementasi Komponen UI Dashboard dengan TypeScript dan Glassmorphism
Knowledge_Items.summary: Mengimplementasikan komponen UI utama dashboard (Card, Sidebar, Header, ChartWidget) menggunakan TypeScript dengan desain glassmorphism dan menyusunnya dalam layout Bento Grid.
Knowledge_Items.distillation: Saat membangun dashboard dengan TypeScript dan glassmorphism, susun komponen UI utama seperti Card, Sidebar, Header, dan ChartWidget dalam struktur folder yang terorganisir (src/components), manfaatkan tipe data yang didefinisikan (src/types) untuk props, dan gunakan layout seperti Bento Grid untuk menyusun komponen-komponen tersebut dalam tampilan yang menarik dan responsif.

best_practices.title: Creating a Premium AI Marketing Agency Landing Page
best_practices.summary: Successfully built a premium AI marketing agency landing page with bento grid design, glassmorphism effects, Framer Motion animations, and Lucide icons, using a professional folder structure (hooks, components, services) and strict TypeScript.
best_practices.distillation: When building landing pages with specific design requirements, prioritize upfront planning to select appropriate UI libraries (e.g., Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Lucide Icons) and establish a clear folder structure (hooks, components, services) for maintainability. Utilize TypeScript's strict mode to enhance code quality and prevent potential errors.

best_practices.title: React Typescript Project Setup and Component Generation
best_practices.summary: This trajectory demonstrates a successful setup of a React Typescript project with Vite, including the generation of several components to fulfill the design requirements of a landing page.
best_practices.distillation: When building a React TypeScript project with a specific design in mind (e.g., bento grid, glassmorphism), initiate the project using Vite and immediately structure the folder with 'hooks', 'components', and 'services' directories; then, create the core components (Header, Hero, BentoCard, BentoGrid, Footer) and define the necessary types for type safety using index.ts in the types directory.
